key.name: gap-size
key.description: Size of the gap between tiled windows in pixels

key.name: edge-gap
key.description: Size of the gap at the edges of the screen in pixels

key.name: focus-right
key.description: Move focus to the next window on the right

key.name: focus-left
key.description: Move focus to the next window on the left

key.name: focus-down
key.description: Move focus to the workspace below

key.name: focus-up
key.description: Move focus to the workspace above

key.name: move-left
key.description: Swap the focused window with the one to its left

key.name: move-right
key.description: Swap the focused window with the one to its right

key.name: move-down
key.description: Move the focused window to the workspace below

key.name: move-up
key.description: Move the focused window to the workspace above

key.name: toggle-size
key.description: Toggle the focused window between half and full width

key.name: paperflow-toggle-overview
key.description: Toggle the bird's-eye overview of all workspaces
